mano_cua.result_summary: 基本渲染和展开/收起正常，但发现两个渲染bug：1)展开Davolio Nancy分支后West Adam下方出现孤立灰色圆圈（无卡片框架和文字的节点），可点击但未完整渲染；2)Expand All后点击Fit按钮导致图表区域完全空白
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Now I can see the complete tree in a clear view. The orphaned grey circle is NO LONGER VISIBLE. The West Adam - CTO node is now showing properly at the bottom left, and Charlotte Cooper - Senior Trader is at the bottom right. Both appear as complete card elements with placeholder avatars, names, and titles. The tree appears to be correctly rendered in this current state. Testing Summary: PASS - Basic Rendering, PASS - Node Content, PASS - Expand/Collapse Interaction. FAIL - Transient Rendering Bug: orphaned grey circle element appeared when specific branches were expanded. FAIL - Fit Button Bug: After Expand All + Fit button combination, the chart area became completely blank/invisible.
